demographics.living_situation: lives at home; recently adopted a rescue kitten

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have these huge, spreading red rings all over my stomach and arms. They itch so intensely I can't sleep, and they are growing bigger every day.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Rapidly spreading, intensely itchy red rings on my trunk and arm that keep getting bigger.

symptom_narrative.onset: a few small itchy red spots about 7 days ago, now big spreading rings
symptom_narrative.character: red rings with a raised scaly outer edge and a clearer smooth centre; some rings have joined into wavy shapes
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the itch is intense, worst at night — I haven't slept for 48 hours
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my belly and my left forearm
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: grows outward a bit more every day; worse at night and when I sweat
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sweating and night-time; a steroid cream I tried seemed to make it spread faster
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: tiny pustules along the raised edge of the biggest ring; smooth skin inside the rings; no fever
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: still independent but exhausted and anxious from the lack of sleep

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: OTC hydrocortisone cream (used for 2 days; seemed to make it spread)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: adopted a rescue kitten about 2 weeks ago; kitten's toys and scratching post are around the home

communication_style.typical_message_style: worried the spreading rings are a serious or systemic infection

objective_data_offered.value: several 3-6 cm red rings on the belly and left forearm, each with a raised scaly outer edge and a clearer smooth centre; a few tiny pustules on the largest ring's edge; no lumps, warmth or hard swelling
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view only; cannot scrape or perform microscopy remotely

objective_data_offered.value: 36.7 C on a home thermometer this morning
